mapper.select: select count(1) as bill_count, ifnull(sum(total_qty), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) as total_amount from wms_inbound where status = '1'
select count(1) as bill_count, ifnull(sum(total_qty), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) as total_amount from wms_outbound where status = '1'

select count(distinct concat(bill_type, '_', bill_id)) as bill_count, ifnull(sum(quantity), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as total_amount from wms_stock_log where bill_type in ('transfer', 'inventory_check') and in_out = '1'

select count(distinct concat(bill_type, '_', bill_id)) as bill_count, ifnull(sum(quantity), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as total_amount from wms_stock_log where bill_type in ('transfer', 'inventory_check') and in_out = '2'

select inbound_id as bill_id, inbound_no as bill_no, 'inbound' as business_type, total_qty as total_quantity, total_amount as total_amount, create_time as business_time, concat('入库类型:', ifnull(inbound_type, '')) as summary from wms_inbound where status = '1'
order by create_time desc limit #{operationLimit}

select outbound_id as bill_id, outbound_no as bill_no, 'outbound' as business_type, total_qty as total_quantity, total_amount as total_amount, create_time as business_time, concat('出库类型:', ifnull(outbound_type, '')) as summary from wms_outbound where status = '1'
order by create_time desc limit #{operationLimit}

select bill_id, concat(upper(bill_type), '-', bill_id) as bill_no, 'inventory' as business_type, ifnull(sum(quantity), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as total_amount, max(create_time) as business_time, concat('库存调整-', case when bill_type = 'transfer' then '调拨入库' when bill_type = 'inventory_check' then '盘点盘盈' else bill_type end) as summary from wms_stock_log where bill_type in ('transfer', 'inventory_check') and in_out = '1'
group by bill_type, bill_id order by business_time desc limit #{operationLimit}

select bill_id, concat(upper(bill_type), '-', bill_id) as bill_no, 'inventory' as business_type, ifnull(sum(quantity), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as total_amount, max(create_time) as business_time, concat('库存调整-', case when bill_type = 'transfer' then '调拨出库' when bill_type = 'inventory_check' then '盘点盘亏' else bill_type end) as summary from wms_stock_log where bill_type in ('transfer', 'inventory_check') and in_out = '2'
group by bill_type, bill_id order by business_time desc limit #{operationLimit}

select ifnull(sum(wms_stock.quantity), 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(sum(wms_stock.quantity * ifnull(md_product.cost_price, 0)), 0) as total_amount from wms_stock left join md_product on wms_stock.product_id = md_product.product_id where 1 = 1
and wms_stock.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
